title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book my vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave accrual is calculated on a pro-rata basis for part-time employees. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance of your desired leave dates. This allows sufficient time for your manager to review and approve your request. Once approved, you will receive a confirmation email. If you need to cancel or modify your leave, please notify your manager and HR as soon as possible. For any questions regarding your leave balance or the booking process, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
